footer.tagline: The global services marketplace connecting care, learning, and research.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: SandiLink does not provide medical care or clinical services. We do not verify credentials; users must conduct their own due diligence. Call 911 or your local emergency number for medical emergencies.

hero.subheadline: SandiLink is the global marketplace that brings together healthcare service users, providers, students, preceptors, researchers, and grant writers in one seamless, human-centered platform.

explainer.heading: See how SandiLink works.
explainer.subheading: What if connecting to care, a mentor, or a grant writer was as easy as one click?
explainer.placeholderSubtitle: Coming soon — hosted on YouTube, click-to-play.

about.heading: One platform. Unlimited pathways to support and expertise.
about.lede: A global marketplace built for access, connection, and opportunity.
about.body: SandiLink is the flagship marketplace of One Sandi Platform — designed to remove barriers and make it easier for people to find the support, expertise, and pathways they need. Whether someone is seeking healthcare services, clinical placements, or research collaboration, SandiLink brings everything together in one intuitive, inclusive, and globally accessible system.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Services Marketplace
healthcare.lede: A global access point for healthcare support.
healthcare.body: Individuals, families, and communities can connect with independent healthcare professionals and non-professionals — including doctors, nurses, allied health providers, caregivers, wellness practitioners, community health workers, and supportive care companions.
healthcare.callout: SandiLink expands access, reduces barriers, and helps people find the right care at the right time.

education.title: Education Marketplace
education.lede: A dedicated pathway for clinical placements and mentorship.
education.bullet1: Students can find preceptors and clinical mentors
education.bullet2: Preceptors can list their availability and specialties
education.bullet3: Schools and academic programs gain structure, clarity, and transparency
education.callout: SandiLink simplifies the clinical placement process and supports professional development.

research.title: Research & Grants Marketplace
research.lede: A global hub for research collaboration and funding support.
research.bullet1: Researchers can connect with grant writers, explore funding, and access journal pathways
research.bullet2: Grant writers can showcase expertise and grow their practice
research.bullet3: Journals and academic teams gain a unified space for collaboration
research.callout: SandiLink connects the global research community with the tools and people they need.

whySandilink.heading: Why SandiLink?
whySandilink.subheading: Real scenarios. Real people. Real reach — across three marketplaces.

scenarios.hc1Headline: A son in Houston connects with a physician in Sierra Leone to care for his mother — without borders standing in the way.
scenarios.hc1Body: SandiLink makes it possible for families to coordinate care for loved ones across continents.
scenarios.hc2Headline: A young woman in Atlanta finds a trusted nurse practitioner in Lagos for virtual reproductive health guidance.
scenarios.hc2Body: Access to culturally aligned care becomes simple, safe, and direct.
scenarios.hc3Headline: A caregiver in New Jersey connects with a community health worker in Ghana to support her aging father's daily needs.
scenarios.hc3Body: SandiLink extends care networks beyond geography, language, and local resources.
scenarios.ed1Headline: A nursing student in the Philippines connects with a board-certified preceptor in Houston — no gatekeepers, no waiting lists.
scenarios.ed1Body: SandiLink removes barriers to clinical learning and mentorship.
scenarios.ed2Headline: A public health student in India secures a remote practicum with a U.S.-based mentor who understands her goals.
scenarios.ed2Body: Geography no longer limits professional development.
scenarios.ed3Headline: A preceptor in Mississippi lists availability and instantly connects with students who need placements now.
scenarios.ed3Body: SandiLink supports both sides of the learning journey.
scenarios.rg1Headline: A researcher in Nairobi connects with a grant writer in London to prepare a competitive global funding application.
scenarios.rg1Body: SandiLink accelerates research by connecting expertise across borders.
scenarios.rg2Headline: A doctoral student in Chicago finds a journal editor in South Africa to guide her manuscript submission.
scenarios.rg2Body: Support becomes accessible, personal, and timely.
scenarios.rg3Headline: A research team in Brazil collaborates with U.S. grant writers to secure funding for a community health project.
scenarios.rg3Body: SandiLink strengthens global discovery through meaningful partnerships.

approach.heading: Technology designed around people — not institutions.
approach.pillar1Body: Built around real experiences, real needs, and real challenges faced by people seeking care, education, and collaboration.
approach.pillar2Body: Designed to scale across borders, cultures, and communities — making expert support available to everyone, everywhere.
approach.pillar3Body: Ethical design, clear communication, and user-first principles. Every professional is verified before going live.
approach.pillar4Body: Smart matching, streamlined workflows, and intelligent tools that reduce friction so people can focus on what matters.

mission.heading: Because access should be simple — not stressful.
mission.lede: SandiLink was created to solve a global problem: people everywhere struggle to access care, secure clinical placements, or find research support.
mission.missionBody: To build scalable, human-centered systems that empower people regardless of geography, background, or resources.
mission.visionBody: A world where healthcare is accessible, education is supported, and research is collaborative and globally connected.

community.heading: A global community of users, providers, and partners.
community.body: SandiLink supports individuals, families, healthcare providers, students, preceptors, researchers, grant writers, journals, and institutions across the world.
community.accent: We're building a connected ecosystem that strengthens care, learning, and discovery.

founding.testimonialsBody: Real voices from SandiLink's earliest community.
founding.founderQuote: We built SandiLink because talent shouldn't be limited by access. From healthcare to preceptorship to research and grants, we connect people across three purpose-built marketplaces. We're just getting started — and everyone who joins now helps shape what comes next.
founding.heading: Become a Founding Member
founding.subheading: Join now and receive exclusive benefits reserved for our earliest community members.
founding.benefit1Body: Be first into all three marketplaces: Healthcare Services, Preceptor Connect™, and Research & Grants.
founding.benefit2Body: Founding members receive priority positioning in the directory, making you more visible to learners, collaborators, and opportunities.
founding.benefit3Body: Shape the platform. Founding members get a direct line to the product team, with your feedback influencing what we build next.
founding.benefit4Body: A permanent badge on your profile that signals you were here from the beginning — visible to every user who views your profile.

finalCta.heading: Join the platform redefining global connection.
finalCta.body: Create your account and start connecting with healthcare providers, mentors, researchers, and grant writers today.

shared.sidePanelTagline: Connecting healthcare professionals, students, and institutions on one seamless platform.

experts.title: Find a healthcare expert
experts.description: Browse verified providers across clinical care, therapy, research, mentorship, and more. Sign up free to message, book, or save profiles.

preceptors.title: Find a preceptor
preceptors.description: Connect with verified preceptors across nursing, PA, DNP, and allied-health programs. Sign up free to request a placement.

grants.title: Browse open grants
grants.description: Track funding opportunities across NIH, NSF, WHO, foundations, and government agencies. Sign up to save grants, get deadline reminders, and match with writers.

grantWriters.title: Find a grant writer
grantWriters.description: Verified writers with track records across NIH, NSF, foundations, and global-health funders. Sign up free to compare profiles and start a project.

journals.title: Browse journals
journals.description: Peer-reviewed venues across digital health, biomedical research, public health, and informatics. Sign up free to track submissions and shortlist targets.

faq.heading: Answers, fast.
faq.intro: Browse the most common questions across accounts, billing, placements, privacy, and troubleshooting. Filter by category or search by keyword.
faq.didntFindBody: Our support team is ready to help — most replies land within one business day.

support.heading: We're here to help.
support.intro: Browse self-serve resources, reach our team directly, or submit a support request — whichever is fastest for what you need.
support.reachUsIntro: Prefer email, phone, or chat? Pick the channel that fits.

success.heading: Payment successful — welcome to SandiLink Pro!
success.body: Your subscription is active and your provider profile is ready to go live. We've emailed your receipt and a quick-start checklist.
success.dashboardCardDescription: Finish your profile, set availability, and accept your first bookings.
success.receiptCardDescription: Manage your plan, payment method, and history at any time.
success.needAnything: Need anything? Reach our team at

failed.heading: Payment failed — please update your card or try again.
failed.body: Your subscription was not activated and you have not been charged. Here are the common reasons this happens.
failed.commonReasonsBody: Any of the below can stop a payment. Try again with a different card or method.
failed.reasonCardDeclined: The card was declined or has expired.
failed.reasonInsufficientFunds: Insufficient funds available on the payment method.
failed.reasonBankFlagged: Your bank flagged the transaction as suspicious.
failed.reasonAddressMismatch: The billing address didn't match what your bank has on file.
failed.reasonNetworkTimeout: A network or gateway timeout interrupted the transaction.
failed.tryAgainDescription: Use the same plan with a different payment method.
failed.needHelpDescription: Our team can help diagnose and unblock the payment.

pricing.heading: Simple, flat pricing — no commission, ever.
pricing.intro: Subscribe once, list your services, and keep 100% of every booking. Choose monthly for flexibility or annual to save 17%.
pricing.contextRegisterTitle: One step left — pick a plan
pricing.contextRegisterBody: Care providers need an active subscription before reaching the dashboard. Choose a plan below to finish registration.
pricing.contextGateBody: Your provider dashboard needs an active subscription. Pick a plan to restore access.
pricing.usdNote: Prices listed in USD. You will be charged in your local currency, converted to USD at checkout.

why.heading: Why our pricing is different
why.subheading: Most marketplaces take 15–30% off every booking. We don't.
why.earningsBody: SandiLink takes no commission on bookings. You pay a flat subscription, your clients pay you, and the full booking amount goes to you.
why.currencyBody: Stripe, PayPal, and regional gateways handle conversion. The platform settles in USD; you and your clients see prices in your local currency.
why.cancelBody: No long-term contracts. Cancel from your billing dashboard and keep access until the end of your current period.

payments.heading: Pay your way
payments.subheading: Phase 1 gateways are live now. Phase 2 regional gateways come online as we expand.

faq.heading: Pricing FAQ
faq.q1: Do you take a commission on my bookings?
faq.a1: No. SandiLink is subscription-only for providers — you pay a flat monthly or annual fee, and you keep 100% of what your clients pay you.
faq.a2: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade from your provider billing dashboard at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at your next renewal.
faq.q3: What happens if my payment fails?
faq.a3: We'll email you and retry over a few days. If it can't be collected, your public listing is paused (not deleted) until you update your payment method.
faq.a4: Credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal at launch. Regional gateways including Flutterwave, Paystack, M-Pesa, Razorpay, and MercadoPago come online as we expand globally.

finalCta.heading: Ready to start earning?
finalCta.body: Create your provider account, complete your profile, and pick the plan that fits.

trustSafety.heading: Built for people. Protected by policy.
trustSafety.intro: SandiLink is a global marketplace, which means real people make real connections through it. Here's how we keep that experience safe, transparent, and accountable.

pillars.heading: Six pillars of platform safety
pillars.subheading: Every SandiLink interaction is shaped by these guardrails.
pillars.verificationBody: Care providers, preceptors, students, researchers, and grant writers submit credentials, licensure, or program enrollment before a profile goes public. Incomplete profiles are excluded from search.
pillars.moderationBody: Profiles, reviews, and messages flagged by users or our systems land in a moderation queue. Admins approve, remove, suspend, or warn — every action is logged.
pillars.privacyBody: Intake forms and health information are encrypted in transit and at rest. PHI is visible only to the assigned care provider — never to platform admins or other users.
pillars.securityBody: Optional two-factor authentication, email verification, password reset flows, and audit logging on every sensitive action keep accounts under your control.
pillars.paymentsBody: Payments run through Stripe, PayPal, and regional gateways (Flutterwave, Paystack, M-Pesa, Razorpay, MercadoPago). We never store full card numbers.
pillars.disputesBody: If something goes wrong, file a dispute. Our team reviews communications, applies platform policy, and issues a documented resolution.

policies.heading: What you should know before you book
policies.subheading: SandiLink protects users — but a marketplace works best when everyone shows up informed.
policies.whoTitle: Who you can find on SandiLink
policies.whoBody: Independent professionals offer their own services and are responsible for delivering them. SandiLink is a marketplace — we facilitate connection and payment, but we do not employ providers or guarantee clinical outcomes.
policies.dueDiligenceBody: Always confirm a provider's credentials with the appropriate licensing body, ask for references, and review profile ratings and reviews before booking.
policies.communicationBody: On-platform messaging gives both sides a record, supports dispute resolution, and lets us moderate when something goes wrong. Off-platform contact is at your own risk.
policies.emergenciesBody: SandiLink is not an emergency service. For medical emergencies call 911 (or your local emergency number). For mental health crises in the US, call or text 988.

reporting.heading: How to report something
reporting.subheading: If something feels off — a profile, a review, a message, a payment — report it. We take every report seriously.
reporting.s1Body: Every profile, review, and message has a report option. Pick the closest reason and add detail — what happened, when, and the user(s) involved.
reporting.s2Body: Reports go to admin moderation and disputes. Sensitive cases (safety, fraud, PHI breach) are escalated immediately.
reporting.s3Body: Outcomes range from a warning to content removal, account suspension, or permanent ban. Every step is recorded in the audit log.
reporting.s4Body: We close the loop with the reporting user — the resolution, what happens next, and how to escalate if you disagree.

finalCta.heading: See something? Tell us.
finalCta.body: Our trust & safety team responds to reports within one business day. For urgent safety issues, mark your message as urgent — we'll triage it immediately.

howItWorks.heading: Six steps from sign-up to booking.
howItWorks.intro: SandiLink connects service users, providers, students, preceptors, researchers, and grant writers across three global marketplaces. Here's the flow that powers every booking, placement, and grant project.

flow.heading: How a SandiLink engagement flows
flow.subheading: The same six steps power every booking, placement, and grant project — only the participants change.
flow.s1Body: Choose your role — service user, care provider, student, preceptor, institution, researcher, or grant writer — and tell us what you need.
flow.s2Body: Add credentials, specialties, availability, and a short bio. Professionals subscribe to activate their public listing.
flow.s3Body: Search public directories or let our matching engine surface the best providers, preceptors, or grant writers for you.
flow.s4Body: Open a thread, ask questions, share intake forms or proposals, and confirm scope before booking.
flow.s5Body: Pay in your local currency through Stripe, PayPal, or a regional gateway. Funds are settled in USD on the platform side.
flow.s6Body: Run the appointment, placement, or project on the platform — track hours, deliverables, evaluations — and leave a review at completion.

verticals.heading: How it works in each marketplace
verticals.subheading: Three verticals, one consistent flow. Pick the one closest to what you need.
verticals.healthcareSummary: Service users connect with independent doctors, nurses, allied health, caregivers, wellness practitioners, and community health workers.
verticals.healthcareFlow1: Search providers by specialty, location, rating, or delivery mode
verticals.healthcareFlow2: Open a profile, message, and book a virtual or in-person session
verticals.healthcareFlow3: Complete intake, pay, attend the appointment, and leave a review
verticals.educationSummary: Students and institutions request clinical placements with preceptors who list their availability, capacity, and accepted programs.
verticals.educationFlow1: Students upload credentials and set specialty + location preferences
verticals.educationFlow2: Send a placement request with start date, hours, and scope
verticals.educationFlow3: Preceptor accepts; track hours, documents, evaluations through completion
verticals.researchSummary: Researchers find grant writers, browse curated grants and journals, and run collaborations with deliverables and milestones.
verticals.researchFlow1: Browse grants, journals, or matched grant writers
verticals.researchFlow2: Send a collaboration request with scope, deadline, and funding amount
verticals.researchFlow3: Track deliverables, manuscripts, and submissions in a shared workspace

why.heading: Why people choose SandiLink
why.subheading: We removed the gatekeepers without removing the guardrails.
why.verificationBody: Profiles include credentials, licensure, and program enrollment. Reviews and admin moderation keep the marketplace honest.
why.subscriptionBody: Care providers pay a flat subscription and keep 100% of their earnings — no per-booking commission.
why.globalBody: 20+ countries supported on day one, with Tier 1 multilingual UI (English, Spanish, French) and a roadmap for Portuguese, Arabic, Swahili, Mandarin, and Hindi.
why.pricingBody: Pay in your local currency via Stripe, PayPal, or regional gateways like Flutterwave, Paystack, M-Pesa, Razorpay, and MercadoPago.

finalCta.heading: Ready to get connected?
finalCta.body: Create your account, choose your role, and start booking, placing, or collaborating in minutes.

subscribeCheckout.stepIndicator: Step 4 of 5 — Payment. After checkout, you'll be redirected to your provider dashboard.
